decoder_heading: Consent Info for User's Contact List
ident_heading: Consent Info for User's Contact List
heading_content_part: Video Call All in One includes a feature in which you can communicate with your relatives. You must provide your mobile number and basic account data (such as profile name, profile picture, and information) to create a Highapp Video Call account. We may get your contact list to make you public for the users who are in your contact list if you confirm the consent screen and accept the giving of your phone number. If not, you can discard it and can not be use this feature. Thanks to user permission, you will be communicating with your contacts easier. You will be able to see which users are using the application in your contact list. After getting the contact list, the users will be notified of other users who are on the contact list. We do not require users' screen names to be users' real names. Note that users who are in others' contacts will see you by the name they saved and not by your screen name.  Thank you for using Video Call All in One App
